actionCalls.name: Upload_a_File_to_G_Drive
actionCalls.label: Upload a File to G Drive

fields.name: ExistingPhoto1
fields.fieldText: {!Need_Offer.Image1__c}

fields.name: Blank2
fields.fieldText: #2

fields.name: ExistingPhoto3
fields.fieldText: {!Need_Offer.Image3__c}

fields.name: ExistingPhoto4
fields.fieldText: {!Need_Offer.Image4__c}

fields.name: Size
fields.fieldText:
Note: Images must be 4.2 MB or less.

The upload may fail if your image is too large.

fields.name: COnfirmation_0_0
fields.fieldText: Your photo was successfully removed.

fields.name: Confirmation
fields.fieldText: Your photo was successfully uploaded.

fields.name: COnfirmation_0
fields.fieldText: We were unable to upload your photo. Please try again.

fields.name: COnfirmation_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: Only the owner of this item can upload photos.
